query:
SELECT fs.code as section_code, fs.name as section_name, rt.code as type_code, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(ff.code ORDER BY ff.displayOrder) as field_codes
FROM formSections fs
JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
LEFT JOIN formFields ff ON ff.sectionId = fs.id AND ff.isActive = true
WHERE fs.isActive = true
AND fs.code IN (
  SELECT code FROM formSections WHERE isActive = true GROUP BY code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT requestTypeId) > 1
)
GROUP BY fs.id, fs.code, fs.name, rt.code
ORDER BY fs.code, rt.code

       GROUP_CONCAT(ff.code ORDER BY ff.displayOrder) as field_codes
FROM formSections fs
JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
LEFT JOIN formFields ff ON ff.sectionId = fs.id AND ff.isActive = true
WHERE fs.isActive = true
AND fs.code IN (
  SELECT code FROM formSections WHERE isActive = true GROUP BY code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT requestTypeId) > 1
)
GROUP BY fs.id, fs.code, fs.name, rt.code
ORDER BY fs.code, rt.code
